title: Daybreak Shader
description: A simple vanilla plus shader with screen space reflections! In Alpha!
body:
A simple Vanilla plus shader made to teach how to make shaders! 
Tutorial part 1 here: [https://youtu.be/RjyNVmsTBmA](https://youtu.be/RjyNVmsTBmA)

Features:

Resource pack labPBR support

Screen-Space Reflections

Cook-Torrance lighting

Distant Horizons support
